display_name: 兔子镜小剧场 / Rabbit Mirror Theater（小小维修兔 v1.1 合一测试版）
author: Toto
description: TEST build: consolidates the legacy code-block, plain-text, source/SVG, and interaction rescue entry points into Maintenance Rabbit v1.2. Each rendered RabbitMirror has one mirror-scoped four-state control; patrol and repair are user-triggered and never modify other mirrors. Legacy global rescue switches are migrated then disabled. Full-chain diagnostics remain available for unknown or unrendered failures. Retains 101 thematic elements, 177 presentation formats, Menu QR v2.1, thinking isolation, readability safeguards, and all existing generation features.
